findings.title: snap-stanford/stark
findings.description: (NeurIPS D&B 2024) STaRK: Benchmarking LLM Retrieval on Textual and Relational Knowledge Bases

findings.title: visual-rag/visual-rag
findings.description: Repository for paper Visual-RAG: Benchmarking Text-to-Image Retrieval Augmented Generation for Visual Knowledge Intensive Queries

findings.title: xmpuspus/kb-arena
findings.description: Benchmark 7 retrieval strategies on your own docs — naive vector, contextual, QnA pairs, knowledge graph, RAPTOR, PageIndex, and hybrid. Find which KB architecture fits your data.

findings.title: junhongmit/HybridRAG-Bench
findings.description: HybridRAG-Bench is a reusable benchmark construction framework for evaluating retrieval-intensive, multi-hop reasoning over hybrid knowledge. It automatically builds coupled text and knowledge graph environments from time-framed corpora and generates diverse, path-grounded QA tasks to diagnose RAG and KG-RAG systems.

findings.title: velvetmonkey/flywheel-memory
findings.description: MCP server giving AI a knowledge graph over Obsidian vaults. 13-layer scoring that learns. Local-first, zero cloud.

findings.title: LuciusLan/Visual-RAG
findings.description: Repository for our paper Visual-RAG: Benchmarking Text-to-Image Retrieval Augmented Generation for Visual Knowledge Intensive Queries

findings.title: Bruce-XJChen/MRBench
findings.description: MRBench: A Multi-Image Reasoning Benchmark with Adaptive Knowledge Retrieval

findings.title: g-aditi/vera
findings.description: Optimizing Knowledge Retrieval: A Benchmark-Driven Study of VecDB-RAG Integration

findings.title: predlico/ARAGOG-2
findings.description: ARAGOG 2: This project focuses on benchmarking knowledge graph based retrieval augmented generation (RAG) using a real world data-set.

findings.title: safishamsi/Knowledge-Graph-Based-Hybrid-RAG-System
findings.description: Knowledge Graph-RAG system using Neo4j, LangChain, LangGraph, Claude-3.5-Sonnet. Hybrid retrieval: SBERT embeddings + graph traversal + BM25. 61K papers, 190K authors from Scopus. 50% NDCG improvement, 57% bias reduction. Includes notebooks, evaluation scripts, benchmark queries. Python/Jupyter.

findings.title: charlesnchr/riddler-bench
findings.description: Lightweight LLM benchmark with deliberately oblique, riddle-like questions. Questions are designed to test lateral thinking corresponding to multi-hop knowledge retrieval.

findings.title: RaphaelHaddad/Real-Time-Brain-Inspired-Video-Memory
findings.description: Transform videos into dynamic, queryable knowledge graphs like a digital hippocampus! Use VLMs for chunked analysis, LLM injectors for triplet extraction, and ACS Automata for evolving neural-like networks. Real-time retrieval, benchmarking, and seamless collaboration via Neo4j exports.Modular Python pipeline: Mac/Linux/WSL-ready, Docker Neo4j.

findings.title: juliodondisch/equipade-component-retrieval-benchmark
findings.description: This repository contains Equipade's Component Retrieval Benchmark, a RAG system benchmark meant to test knowledge retrieval for accurate answers regarding vehicle and machine questions

findings.title: rbhardwaj2186/Vector-Database-Exploration-and-Benchmarking
findings.description: Enterprise-Ready Vector Database Exploration and Benchmarking for Knowledge Retrieval Systems

findings.title: nfemmanuel/iranti-benchmarking
findings.description: Rigorous benchmarking program for Iranti — 11 benchmark tracks across retrieval, memory, multi-agent, and knowledge management.

findings.title: Yiming1220/RAG-knowledge-base
findings.description: RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) QA system for a model agency, comparing pure LLM vs RAG with TF-IDF retrieval, cosine similarity search, and benchmark analysis.

findings.title: MatSourceAI/Rag_benchmark_SSE_O310
findings.description: Impacts of Retrieval-Augmented Generation Pipeline Configuration on Knowledge Extraction for Solid-State Electrolyte Research

findings.title: khtut17/GNN-Enhanced-RAG
findings.description: Code and benchmark for "GNN-Enhanced RAG: Structured Retrieval via Neural Graph Traversal for Knowledge-Augmented Generation" (ANTIC 2025)

findings.title: miharcan/signal-aware-rag
findings.description: Signal-aware Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) with knowledge graph conditioning, agent-based reasoning, and evaluation benchmarks for financial intelligence queries.

findings.title: ansh-info/stark-agent
findings.description: STaRK: Agentic AI benchmark, which is designed to evaluate how well LLMs and retrieval systems work with semi-structured knowledge bases.
